raw.message: Crunchy, gummy, yummy goodness. Try NERDS Gummy Clusters today!

hook.summary: A colorful overhead display of Nerds products zooms into a bag of Gummy Clusters being poured into a bowl.
hook.visual_action: The camera zooms from a wide shot of various Nerds candies to a close-up of the Rainbow Gummy Clusters bag pouring into a white bowl.

scene_flow: Overhead shot of a desk featuring various Nerds candy products and colorful accessories.
Zoom in on the Rainbow Nerds Gummy Clusters bag as it is picked up.
The bag pours candy into a bowl with 'CRUNCHY', 'GUMMY', and 'YUMMY' text popping up.
Two hands reach into the bowl to grab the candy.
Final shot of the bowl filled with candy and floating descriptive text.
audience_proxy: Gen Z and Millennial snackers who enjoy vibrant, multi-textured candy experiences.
